Endpoints.Name: GetVaultItems
Endpoints.Summary: Get all items for inside a Vault

Parameters.Name: vaultUuid
Parameters.Description: The UUID of the Vault to fetch Items from

Parameters.Name: filter
Parameters.Description: Filter the Item collection based on Item name using SCIM eq filter

400.Name: response400
400.Description: Unable to create item due to invalid input

Parameters.Name: vaultUuid
Parameters.Description: The UUID of the Vault to create an Item in

Errors.ErrorMessage: Unable to create item due to invalid input

Parameters.Name: vaultUuid
Parameters.Description: The UUID of the Vault the item is in

Parameters.Name: itemUuid
Parameters.Description: The UUID of the Item to update

Endpoints.Name: GetVaultItemById
Endpoints.Summary: Get the details of an Item

Parameters.Name: vaultUuid
Parameters.Description: The UUID of the Vault to fetch Item from

Parameters.Name: itemUuid
Parameters.Description: The UUID of the Item to fetch

Endpoints.Name: PatchVaultItem
Endpoints.Description:
Applies a modified [RFC6902 JSON Patch](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc6902) document to an Item or ItemField. This endpoint only supports `add`, `remove` and `replace` operations.

When modifying a specific ItemField, the ItemField's ID in the `path` attribute of the operation object: `/fields/{fieldId}`
Endpoints.Summary: Update a subset of Item attributes

200.Name: response200
200.Description: OK - Item updated. If no Patch operations were provided, Item is unmodified.

Response.Name: response
Response.Description: OK - Item updated. If no Patch operations were provided, Item is unmodified.

Parameters.Name: vaultUuid
Parameters.Description: The UUID of the Vault the item is in

Parameters.Name: itemUuid
Parameters.Description: The UUID of the Item to update

Examples.Name: Add a new ItemField to the Item
Replace an entire Item with new fields. Equivalent to a PUT request.

400.Name: response400
400.Description: Unable to create item due to invalid input

application/json.Example: {"message":"The item doesn't have a {example field name} field.","status":400}

Parameters.Name: vaultUuid
Parameters.Description: The UUID of the Item's Vault

Parameters.Name: itemUuid
Parameters.Description: The UUID of the Item to update

Errors.ErrorMessage: Unable to create item due to invalid input
Errors.ExampleValue: {"message":"The item doesn't have a {example field name} field.","status":400}

Parameters.Name: filter
Parameters.Description: Filter the Vault collection based on Vault name using SCIM eq filter

Parameters.Name: vaultUuid
Parameters.Description: The UUID of the Vault to fetch Items from

Endpoints.Name: GetApiActivity
Endpoints.Summary: Retrieve a list of API Requests that have been made.

Headers.Name: Content-Range
Headers.Description: An decription of what part of the collection has been returned as well as the total size.

ResponseHeaders.Name: Content-Range
ResponseHeaders.Description: An decription of what part of the collection has been returned as well as the total size.

Parameters.Name: limit
Parameters.Description: How many API Events should be retrieved in a single request.

Parameters.Name: offset
Parameters.Description: How far into the collection of API Events should the response start

Endpoints.Name: GetServerHealth
Endpoints.Summary: Get state of the server and its dependencies.

Examples.Name: API server waiting for first authenticated request
API server waiting for first authenticated request

Endpoints.Name: GetPrometheusMetrics
Endpoints.Description: See Prometheus documentation for a complete data model.
Endpoints.Summary: Query server for exposed Prometheus metrics

Endpoints.Name: GetItemFiles
Endpoints.Summary: Get all the files inside an Item

413.Name: response413
413.Description: File content too large to display

application/json.Example: {"message":"File is too large to inline in request. Use the /v1/vaults/{vaultUUID}/items/{itemUUID}/files/{fileUUID}/content endpoint instead.","status":413}

Examples.Name: File too large
Examples.Value: {"message":"File is too large to inline in request. Use the /v1/vaults/{vaultUUID}/items/{itemUUID}/files/{fileUUID}/content endpoint instead.","status":413}

Parameters.Name: vaultUuid
Parameters.Description: The UUID of the Vault to fetch Items from

Parameters.Name: itemUuid
Parameters.Description: The UUID of the Item to fetch files from

Parameters.Name: inline_files
Parameters.Description: Tells server to return the base64-encoded file contents in the response.

Errors.ErrorMessage: File content too large to display
Errors.ExampleValue: {"message":"File is too large to inline in request. Use the /v1/vaults/{vaultUUID}/items/{itemUUID}/files/{fileUUID}/content endpoint instead.","status":413}

413.Name: response413

application/json.Example: {"message":"File is too large to inline in request. Use the /v1/vaults/{vaultUUID}/items/{itemUUID}/files/{fileUUID}/content endpoint instead.","status":413}

Examples.Name: File too large
Examples.Value: {"message":"File is too large to inline in request. Use the /v1/vaults/{vaultUUID}/items/{itemUUID}/files/{fileUUID}/content endpoint instead.","status":413}

Parameters.Name: vaultUuid

Parameters.Name: itemUuid
Parameters.Description: The UUID of the Item to fetch File from

Parameters.Name: fileUuid

Errors.ErrorMessage: File content too large to display
Errors.ExampleValue: {"message":"File is too large to inline in request. Use the /v1/vaults/{vaultUUID}/items/{itemUUID}/files/{fileUUID}/content endpoint instead.","status":413}

Endpoints.Name: DownloadFileByID
Endpoints.Summary: Get the content of a File

Parameters.Name: vaultUuid
Parameters.Description: The UUID of the Vault the item is in

Parameters.Name: itemUuid
Parameters.Description: The UUID of the Item the File is in

Parameters.Name: fileUuid
Parameters.Description: UUID of the file to get content from

EndpointGroups.Name: Items
EndpointGroups.Description: Access and manage items inside 1Password Vaults

CustomTypes.Name: APIRequest
CustomTypes.Description: Represents a request that was made to the API. Including what Token was used and what resource was accessed.

Fields.Name: requestId
Fields.Description: The unique id used to identify a single request.

Fields.Name: timestamp
Fields.Description: The time at which the request was processed by the server.

Fields.Name: message
Fields.Description: A message detailing the error

Fields.Name: status
Fields.Description: HTTP Status Code

Fields.Name: entropy
Fields.Description: For fields with a purpose of `PASSWORD` this is the entropy of the value

Fields.Name: generate
Fields.Description: If value is not present then a new value should be generated for this field

Fields.Name: purpose
Fields.Description: Some item types, Login and Password, have fields used for autofill. This property indicates that purpose and is required for some item types.

Fields.Name: recipe
Fields.Description: The recipe is used in conjunction with the "generate" property to set the character set used to generate a new secure value

Fields.Name: content
Fields.Description: Base64-encoded contents of the file. Only set if size <= OP_MAX_INLINE_FILE_SIZE_KB kb and `inline_files` is set to `true`.

Fields.Name: content_path
Fields.Description: Path of the Connect API that can be used to download the contents of this file.

Fields.Name: id
Fields.Description: ID of the file

Fields.Name: name
Fields.Description: Name of the file

Fields.Name: section
Fields.Description: For files that are in a section, this field describes the section.

Fields.Name: size
Fields.Description: Size in bytes of the file

CustomTypes.Name: GeneratorRecipe
CustomTypes.Description: The recipe is used in conjunction with the "generate" property to set the character set used to generate a new secure value

Fields.Name: excludeCharacters
Fields.Description: List of all characters that should be excluded from generated passwords.

Fields.Name: length
Fields.Description: Length of the generated value

CustomTypes.Name: ServiceDependency
CustomTypes.Description: The state of a registered server dependency.

Fields.Name: message
Fields.Description: Human-readable message for explaining the current state.

Fields.Name: attributeVersion
Fields.Description: The vault version

Fields.Name: contentVersion
Fields.Description: The version of the vault contents

Fields.Name: items
Fields.Description: Number of active items in the vault

Fields.Name: message
Fields.Description: A message detailing the error

Fields.Name: status
Fields.Description: HTTP Status Code

Fields.Name: version
Fields.Description: The Connect server's version

Fields.Name: path
Fields.Description: An RFC6901 JSON Pointer pointing to the Item document, an Item Attribute, and Item Field by Field ID, or an Item Field Attribute

CustomTypes.Name: Purpose
CustomTypes.Description: Some item types, Login and Password, have fields used for autofill. This property indicates that purpose and is required for some item types.

CustomTypes.Name: Section1
CustomTypes.Description: For files that are in a section, this field describes the section.
